tasks.title: Rewrite matchmaker with real ELO matching
tasks.description: Rewrite backend/app/services/matchmaker.py. Replace Bot imports with Agent. Implement real _can_match: no same-user, rematch cooldown (5 min), ELO range with progressive expansion (base 200, +50/min, cap 1000). Use agent_id instead of bot_id everywhere. _create_match creates table, updates sessions to playing, updates agent status, starts first hand via table_manager.
acceptance_criteria: AC-2: ELO range = base + (wait_min * expansion), capped at 1000
AC-3: 5-minute rematch cooldown between same agent pairs
AC-4: _create_match starts first hand via table_manager.start_new_hand
AC-5: All Bot references replaced with Agent

tasks.title: Rewrite scheduler tick for v3
tasks.description: Rewrite backend/app/scheduler/tick.py. New 5-step tick: (1) match queue via matchmaker, (2) detect timeouts (tables with action_deadline < now → handle_timeout), (3) start pending hands (complete hands → start next), (4) settle completed sessions, (5) cleanup empty tables. Update jobs.py log format.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: 5-step tick: match, timeouts, next hands, settle, cleanup
AC-2: Timeout detection queries tables with action_deadline < now
AC-3: Auto-fold on timeout via table_manager.handle_timeout
AC-4: Empty table cleanup (both seats vacated)
AC-5: jobs.py logs tick stats correctly
GATE: scheduler_tick callable with async session

tasks.title: Update elo_service for Agent model
tasks.description: Rewrite backend/app/services/elo_service.py. Replace all Bot references with Agent. update_elo looks up agents via session.agent_id. recalculate_user_elo aggregates from user's agents instead of bots.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: All Bot imports replaced with Agent
AC-2: update_elo uses session.agent_id to find agents
